svg.title: numpy-gpt architecture diagram
svg.desc: GPT decoder-only transformer architecture built from scratch with NumPy/CuPy, showing data flow from character input through embedding, 4 transformer blocks, and output head.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the character tokenizer work in numpy-gpt?')
sendPrompt('What is character-level tokenization and how is it implemented in numpy-gpt?')
sendPrompt('How are token embeddings and sinusoidal positional encoding implemented from scratch in numpy-gpt?')
sendPrompt('Why does numpy-gpt use pre-norm instead of post-norm in its transformer blocks?')
sendPrompt('How is multi-head causal self-attention implemented manually with backprop in numpy-gpt?')
sendPrompt('What does the second LayerNorm do in a transformer block?')
sendPrompt('How is the feed-forward network implemented from scratch in numpy-gpt?')
sendPrompt('How does the linear projection head produce logits in numpy-gpt?')
sendPrompt('How are cross-entropy loss and Adam optimizer implemented from scratch in numpy-gpt?')
sendPrompt('How does numpy-gpt switch between NumPy CPU and CuPy GPU backends?')
sendPrompt('How does CuPy GPU acceleration work in numpy-gpt?')
